items.name: Midnight Motor Madness Scooter
items.description: It's a party on a bike...that delivers tacos! Ride around using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit 'X' to toggle the headlight and 'H' to honk. Click with your mouse to grab a taco from the crate on the back of the vehicle and eat it.

info: Join the group for the latest clothing drops and support original creators instead of the copiers out there. All the clothing I make is original and inspired by my group members or from games like fnf, among us, etc. or memes. We make shirts, pants, tee t-shirts tshirts and take requests. you will always know that those who are among us in the group are wearing original creations, so join the group and share your outfits.
